mathematical calculations. The second section treats of Horii or
horoscopy. The third and the last is termed Ahgaviniscaya—
determination of the limbs—as it explains the method of ascertain-
ing by calculation the ascendant and other houses in a natal
chart.
[The word Sarhhita has a religious halo about it, as it has
been used in connection with the Vedic texts and other hoary
Sastras viz. etc., and the like. It is to be under-
stood that Samhitas are not meant to be original works, but colle-
ctions of materials gathered from various sources. Varahamihira
faithfully follows this tradition and draws profusely from Garga's
work. For, says Garga :
